task_completion.description: Create three ground stations with the specified coordinates and altitudes for CU_Boulder, CSU_FortCollins, and Mines_Golden.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'New ground station' or 'Edit ground station' dialogs in GPredict, with the correct Name, Latitude, Longitude (West is negative or specified as W), and Altitude for each of the three campuses.

task_completion.description: Create three tracking modules named CU_Boulder, CSU_FortCollins, and Mines_Golden.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Create new module' dialog with these names, or the main GPredict window displaying tabs/windows with these exact names.

task_completion.description: Add the four required satellites (ISS, SO-50, AO-85, AO-95) to all three tracking modules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the module configuration dialogs showing ISS (ZARYA), SO-50, AO-85, and AO-95 in the 'Selected Satellites' list, or the active modules displaying tracking data for these specific satellites.

task_completion.description: Assign each tracking module to its corresponding campus ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the module configuration dialogs showing the correct ground station selected in the 'Ground Station' dropdown (e.g., CU_Boulder module assigned to CU_Boulder QTH), or the module display header showing the correct ground station name.

task_completion.description: Set CU_Boulder as the system default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Preferences -> Ground Stations dialog with CU_Boulder selected and set as default (e.g., clicking the 'Make Default' button or a default indicator next to it).

task_completion.description: Configure GPredict to display UTC time for all timestamps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Preferences -> General -> Number and Date Formats dialog with the 'Show time in UTC instead of local time' (or similar UTC setting) checked, or the main interface clock explicitly indicating UTC.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings rather than editing configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show GPredict dialog boxes (New Ground Station, New Module, Preferences) being interacted with.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor or terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) or terminal commands are used to edit `.qth` or `.mod` files directly in the `.config/Gpredict/` directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CU Boulder: 40.0076 N, 105.2659 W (or -105.2659), 1624m. CSU Fort Collins: 40.5734 N, 105.0865 W (or -105.0865), 1525m. Mines Golden: 39.7514 N, 105.2225 W (or -105.2225), 1729m. Required satellites: ISS (ZARYA) [25544], SO-50 [27607], AO-85 [40967], AO-95 [43770]. Default QTH: CU_Boulder. Time format: UTC.
